<?php /* * This file is part of Psy Shell. * * (c) 2012-2026 Justin Hileman * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Psy\TabCompletion\Matcher; /** * A function name tab completion Matcher. * * This matcher provides completion for all internal and user-defined functions. * * @author Marc Garcia <markcial@gmail.com> */ class FunctionsMatcher extends AbstractMatcher { /** * {@inheritdoc} */ public function getMatches(array $tokens, array $info = []): array { $func = $this->getInput($tokens); $functions = \get_defined_functions(); $allFunctions = \array_merge($functions['user'], $functions['internal']); return \array_filter($allFunctions, function ($function) use ($func) { return AbstractMatcher::startsWith($func, $function); }); } /** * {@inheritdoc} */ public function hasMatched(array $tokens): bool { $token = \array_pop($tokens); $prevToken = \array_pop($tokens); switch (true) { case self::hasToken([self::T_NEW, self::T_OBJECT_OPERATOR], $prevToken): return false; case self::hasToken([self::T_OPEN_TAG, self::T_STRING], $token): case self::isOperator($token): return true; } return false; } }
